calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-09-2024 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for a Short Cause Trial in Department 206 sent forthwith for a request for judgment against Defendant Elizabeth Strong.

Dept.505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" only to be used in compliance with California Government Code Section 69957, commencing at 11:46:24 a.m., and concluding at 11:55:41 a.m. (D505).

Roger Jackson, Esq. appearing Plaintiff Bank of America N.A.
Defendant Elizabeth Strong not appearing.

Plaintiff counsel addresses the issue of a live witness present for the hearing.
Counsel confirms that the judgment requested will resolve the entire action.
Counsel moves the court to dismiss Defendant Does 1 to 5.
Counsel to summarize the case and to offer proof.

The Court finds that the plaintiff has laid the proper foundation and has proven its prima facie case.

Good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:

The Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendant:
Damages $6,413.44
Interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $225.00
Total Judgment $6,638.44

Proposed Judgment signed and filed.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-09-2024 Assigned To Trial Court

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
